overview.description: General Electric Company, doing business as GE Aerospace, designs and produces commercial and defense aircraft engines, integrated engine components, electric power, and aircraft systems. The company operates through two segments, Commercial Engines & Services, and Defense & Propulsion Technologies. The Commercial Engines & Services segment designs, develops, manufactures, maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services of jet engines and sale of spare parts for commercial airframes, business aviation, and aeroderivative applications. The Defe...
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, GE Aerospace's revenue was $45.86 billion, an increase of 18.48% compared to the previous year's $38.70 billion. Earnings were $8.70 billion, an increase of 32.76%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 22 analysts, the average rating for GE stock is "Strong Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $350.95, which is a decrease of -1.70% from the latest price.

data.title: GE Aerospace Transcript: AGM 2026
data.text: The meeting highlighted strong financial growth, robust order backlog, and ongoing investments in R&D and manufacturing. All management proposals passed with overwhelming support, while a shareholder proposal on defense-related product due diligence was rejected. Strategic priorities include reinvestment, shareholder returns, and global expansion.
